scripts.check: bun run fmt:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.test: bun run test:root && bun run --cwd opencode test
scripts.lint: oxlint src test opencode/tools opencode/plugins opencode/test
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint src test opencode/tools opencode/plugins opencode/test --fix
scripts.fmt: oxfmt src test opencode/tools opencode/plugins opencode/test
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt src test opencode/tools opencode/plugins opencode/test --check
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:root && bun run --cwd opencode typecheck
